<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Write Release Summary<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Write a standardized npm/GitHub release summary to GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                 | Description                                       | Required | Default           |
|----------------------|---------------------------------------------------|----------|-------------------|
| `event-name`         | GitHub event name.                                | `false`  | ` `               |
| `actor`              | GitHub actor.                                     | `false`  | ` `               |
| `ref`                | Resolved ref.                                     | `false`  | ` `               |
| `branch`             | Resolved source branch.                           | `false`  | ` `               |
| `package-name`       | Package name.                                     | `true`   | ` `               |
| `version`            | Release version.                                  | `true`   | ` `               |
| `tag`                | Release tag.                                      | `true`   | ` `               |
| `already-published`  | Whether the version was already published on npm. | `false`  | `false`           |
| `npm-release-url`    | npm release URL.                                  | `false`  | ` `               |
| `github-release-url` | GitHub release URL.                               | `false`  | ` `               |
| `tarball-name`       | npm tarball filename.                             | `false`  | ` `               |
| `zip-name`           | Zip archive filename.                             | `false`  | ` `               |
| `heading`            | Summary heading.                                  | `false`  | `Release Summary` |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/write-release-summary" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Release summary"
   if: "${{ !cancelled() }}"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/write-release-summary@main"
   with:
    already-published: "${{ steps.npm_check.outputs.already_published }}"
    package-name: "${{ steps.version.outputs.package_name }}"
    tag: "${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}"
    version: "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
